title: 2026 Golden Globes: Female Actor Predictions
text: Neil Turitz provides his predictions for the female acting categories at the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony. In the Drama Film Category, Turitz frames the competition as a close race between two frontrunners. He notes that the race is between Buckley and Reinsve, suggesting these two performers dominate the conversation, though he personally favors the Norwegian actress while predicting the Hollywood Foreign Press Association will select Buckley. In the Musical or Comedy Film category, this category appears to be Cynthia Erivo's to claim. Turitz states emphatically: I think this is Cynthia Erivo's to lose, indicating overwhelming consensus for her victory in this category. For Supporting Film Role, Amy Madigan emerges as the clear frontrunner. Turitz describes her performance as otherworldly and predicts she will win despite strong competition from other nominees. In Television Drama Series, Rhea Seehorn is positioned to triumph, with Turitz suggesting recent sensation that Pluribus has become will propel her to victory over established competitors. For Television Comedy Series, Turitz predicts an upset, calling for Jenna Ortega to win despite strong performances from Jean Smart and Ayo Edebiri, citing the HFPA's tendency to reward unexpected choices. For Limited Series/TV Movie, Michelle Williams is predicted to finally secure a Globe for her acclaimed performance. For Supporting Television Role, Erin Doherty, an Emmy winner, is positioned to win this category as well.
